name: hb_5_10
requirements: As part of your analysis, for the source-receptor pair company 2467 -> station 60 over the period (2025-06-25 08:00 to 2025-06-26 08:00), compute and store: distance_km, bearing_deg (company->station), station_mean_pm25, station_max_pm25 (float), station_exceedance_hours (PM2.5>75, int), company_total_exhaust (float).

turns.query: Help me assess how pollution from Hebei Zongheng Fengnan Steel (company_id: 2467) affects my living environment near Zhengtai Street Heating Station (station_id: 60) during 2025-06-25 08:00:00 to 2025-06-26 08:00:00, and develop daily outdoor activity plans.
